name: Funnel Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the milk and eggs in a mixing bowl or food processor.
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar (if using).
3. Add the sifted ingredients to the egg mixture and beat until smooth.
4. Test the batter by pouring it through a funnel with an opening of about 1/2 inch into the oil. Adjust the consistency by adding more flour or milk as needed.
5. Heat approximately 3/4 cup vegetable oil in a skillet to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Pour the batter through the funnel, creating swirls or spirals from the center outward. The batter will expand; do not fill the entire surface.
7. Cook for about 30 seconds per side for small cakes and 2 minutes per side for large cakes.
8. Turn with tongs when the edges are brown.
9. Remove with tongs and drain on paper towel. Do not stack.
10. Serve warm with powdered sugar, cinnamon, syrup, jam, jelly, ice cream, etc.
Makes: 5 large or 10 small
